description: S44I - Light/Dark Theme Polish: Update app_colors.dart with new/updated color constants, populate light_theme.dart and dark_theme.dart with full theme definitions including input field and chat bubble styling, update app_theme.dart to use the new theme files, and add AnimatedTheme wrapper in main.dart for smooth 300ms easeOutCubic theme transitions.
steps: Update frontend/lib/core/constants/app_colors.dart: Change bgSecondary from #F0EDE8 to #F3F0EB, bgTertiary from #E8E4DE to #EAE6DF, borderDefault from #E0DDD8 to #E2DDD6, bgHover from #E0DDD8 to #E2DDD6, textPrimary from #1A1A1A to #1A1814, textSecondary from #6B6B6B to #6B6560, textMuted from #9B9B9B to #9B9590. Add new constants: lightSuccess (#16A34A), lightWarning (#D97706), lightError (#DC2626), cardBg (#FFFFFF), inputBg (#FFFFFF), inputBorder (#E2DDD6), inputFocusBorder (#CC5801), userBubbleBg (#CC5801), userBubbleText (#FFFFFF), aiBubbleBg (#FFFFFF), aiBubbleBorder (#E2DDD6), aiBubbleText (#1A1814). For dark: change darkBgSecondary from #0D0D0D to #1A1A1A, darkBgTertiary from #1A1A1A to #242424, darkBgHover from #262626 to keep or update. Add darkCardBg (#0F0F0F), darkInputBg (#1A1A1A), darkInputBorder (#2A2A2A), darkInputFocusBorder (#CC5801), darkUserBubbleBg (#CC5801), darkUserBubbleText (#FFFFFF), darkAiBubbleBg (#1A1A1A), darkAiBubbleBorder (#2A2A2A), darkAiBubbleText (#F5F5F5). Update darkTextPrimary from #FFFFFF to #F5F5F5, darkTextSecondary from #A3A3A3 to #A0A0A0. Update darkUserBubble from #1A1A1A to keep as the base dark bubble. Add darkSuccess (#22C55E), darkWarning (#F59E0B), darkError (#EF4444). Keep existing shared success/error/warning as-is for backward compatibility but note they match dark values.

Populate frontend/lib/core/theme/light_theme.dart with a LightTheme class that exports a ThemeData. Include ColorScheme, inputDecorationTheme with the light input colors (bg #FFFFFF, border #E2DDD6, focus border #CC5801), scaffoldBackgroundColor (#FAF8F5), card theme (bg #FFFFFF). Follow the pattern in app_theme.dart.

Populate frontend/lib/core/theme/dark_theme.dart with a DarkTheme class that exports a ThemeData. Include ColorScheme, inputDecorationTheme with the dark input colors (bg #1A1A1A, border #2A2A2A, focus border #CC5801), scaffoldBackgroundColor (#000000), card theme (bg #0F0F0F).

Update frontend/lib/core/theme/app_theme.dart to import and delegate to light_theme.dart and dark_theme.dart if they provide the full ThemeData, OR simply update the existing AppTheme.light and AppTheme.dark getters in-place with the new color values from app_colors.dart. The simpler approach (updating in-place) is preferred to avoid breaking existing code.

Update frontend/lib/main.dart: Wrap MaterialApp.router in an AnimatedTheme or use the themeAnimationDuration and themeAnimationCurve properties of MaterialApp. Since MaterialApp.router does not directly support AnimatedTheme wrapping of the whole app easily, instead just set themeAnimationDuration: Duration(milliseconds: 300) and themeAnimationCurve: Curves.easeOutCubic on the MaterialApp.router widget.
acceptance_criteria: app_colors.dart has all specified color constants with correct hex values
light_theme.dart contains meaningful ThemeData for light mode or app_theme.dart light getter uses updated colors
dark_theme.dart contains meaningful ThemeData for dark mode or app_theme.dart dark getter uses updated colors
main.dart includes smooth theme transition configuration (themeAnimationDuration/Curve)
No compilation errors when running flutter analyze
verification: Read back all modified files and confirm correct hex values
Verify no duplicate or conflicting color constant names
Verify imports are correct across all files
findings: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox, so flutter analyze could not be run. Verification done via file inspection and grep to confirm all color constant references remain valid. CardThemeData used instead of CardTheme (Flutter 3.12+ API). The unused import warning for dark_theme.dart and light_theme.dart was proactively avoided by not importing them into app_theme.dart since app_theme.dart keeps its own inline implementation.
